title: Gomphandra quadrifida
taxonomy: Gomphandra quadrifida is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Stemonuraceae. This plant belongs to the genus Gomphandra, which is a group of flowering plants known for their unique characteristics. The Stemonuraceae family is a small group of flowering plants that are mostly found in tropical regions. Gomphandra quadrifida is native to the tropical regions of Asia. Its classification is further supported by molecular phylogenetic studies that have confirmed its position within the plant kingdom.
uses: Gomphandra quadrifida is known to have medicinal uses in traditional medicine, particularly in Asia. It is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can aid in the treatment of various health issues. intro: Gomphandra quadrifida, also known as the Four-leaved Gomphandra, is a species of flowering plant in the family Stemonuraceae, commonly found in tropical regions of Asia.
